title: stelis despectans
intro: Stelis despectans, also known as the 'Despectans Stelis', is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The roots of Stelis despectans have been used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory diseases due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing relief and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness their medicinal benefits.
